title: Love Personality Test
subtitle: Discover how you love, and how two loves interact

solo.description: One person answers questions and receives their love personality type

duet.description: Two people each answer questions separately, then get a combined compatibility report
duet.report_note: Each person gets their own love type first, then a combined compatibility analysis is shown

pole_a.name: Avoidant
pole_a.description: Uncomfortable with too much closeness, values independence in love

pole_b.name: Pursuer
pole_b.description: Leans into closeness, seeks reassurance and deep bonding

pole_a.name: Lover
pole_a.description: Leads with emotion, vulnerability, and romantic expression

pole_b.name: Guardian
pole_b.description: Leads with protection, stability, and practical devotion

pole_a.name: Depth-Seeker
pole_a.description: Needs profound emotional intimacy and full transparency

pole_b.name: Wonder-Keeper
pole_b.description: Preserves mystery and individuality even within love

questions.text: I feel most loved when someone gives me space to be independent.
I worry when my partner does not respond to messages for a long time.
I need alone time to feel like myself even in a relationship.
Physical and emotional closeness makes me feel secure, not smothered.
I express love through words, vulnerability, and emotional openness.
I show love by taking care of practical things so my partner does not have to.
I fall in love with how someone makes me feel, not just what they do.
I feel most loving when I can protect someone from pain or stress.
I want my partner to know every part of me, even the ugly parts.
I believe keeping some mystery alive is healthy in a long relationship.
I feel most connected when we have talked about our deepest fears together.
I value having my own inner world that even my partner does not fully access.
I sometimes feel like relationships ask too much of me emotionally.
I remember small details about my partner and use them to make them feel seen.
I am not fully satisfied in a relationship unless we have discussed our pasts completely.

types.name: The Romantic Lone Wolf
types.tagline: Loves deeply from a careful distance
types.description: You feel love intensely but you need space to process it on your own terms. You are emotionally expressive when you feel safe but fiercely independent when you do not. You are not cold, you are careful. The right person will feel like freedom, not a cage.
challenges: Pulls away when things get intense
types.love_language: Quality time with clear personal space built in
needs_in_partner: Someone emotionally secure and self-sufficient
A partner who respects space without taking it personally
Consistency without clinginess
Someone who sees independence as a strength, not a threat
red_flags: Partners who interpret every moment of distance as rejection
Someone who needs daily reassurance to feel loved
People who escalate emotionally when given space
Partners who view alone time as a sign something is wrong
types.growth_edge: Leaning into vulnerability instead of retreating when love grows
types.famous_archetype: The artist who loves completely but cannot be owned

ALW.summary: Two independent people who respect each other's space, beautiful balance

AGD.summary: The Guardian's stability helps the Lone Wolf feel safe enough to open

PLW.summary: The Wonder-Keeper Pursuer gives enough space but may feel unseen over time

PLD.summary: The Depth-Seeking Pursuer will feel the distance and spiral into anxiety

PGD.summary: The protector grounds the Lone Wolf but may feel emotionally starved

AGW.summary: Mutual independence with complementary love approaches, works well

PGW.summary: The Keeper grounds without smothering, better than most Pursuer pairings

ALD.summary: Two people who both pull back, can feel like emotional limbo

types.name: The Free Romantic
types.tagline: Love as poetry, mystery as oxygen
types.description: You love with your whole heart but you keep something sacred for yourself. You believe in the magic of the unknown in love, the excitement of a partner who still surprises you. You are emotionally generous but you will never be fully possessed, and you would not want to be.
strengths: Keeps love feeling alive and mysterious
challenges: Can be hard to fully know
Partner may feel held at arm's length
May romanticize over committing to reality
types.love_language: Words of affirmation and shared experiences that feel spontaneous
needs_in_partner: Someone who finds mystery romantic rather than frustrating
A partner who does not equate openness with love
Someone with their own rich inner world
A person who enjoys the ongoing discovery of who you are
red_flags: Partners who demand full transparency as proof of love
Someone who sees withheld thoughts as dishonesty
People who push relentlessly for emotional access
Partners who feel threatened by anything kept private
types.growth_edge: Sharing the unpolished, uncertain parts of yourself
types.famous_archetype: The muse who is loved completely but never fully understood

ALD.summary: Two independent romantics who honor each other's need for mystery

PGD.summary: The protector loves the mystery but may eventually need more access

PLW.summary: Two wonder-keepers, playful and alive, though both may resist going deeper

PLD.summary: The Depth-Seeker will feel permanently locked out and grow frustrated

AGD.summary: Interesting tension, the Guardian is drawn to what they cannot fully reach

AGW.summary: Both value independence, a refreshingly non-suffocating pairing

PGW.summary: The Wonder-Keeper protector respects the mystery, decent harmony

ALW.summary: Two free romantics can be electrifying but also never quite landing

types.name: The Steadfast Protector
types.tagline: Love as a shelter you build every day
types.description: You love through stability, protection, and complete dedication. You are not the one with grand romantic gestures, you are the one still there ten years later when everyone else has left. You need to know your person completely to feel truly bonded.
types.love_language: Acts of service and deep, unhurried conversations
needs_in_partner: Someone who values consistency and dependability over excitement
A partner who communicates openly and welcomes deep conversation
Someone who does not mistake steadiness for lack of passion
A person who appreciates being truly known over time
red_flags: Partners who mistake reliability for boringness
Someone who needs constant novelty to feel attracted
People who pull away when offered genuine care
Partners who are emotionally guarded or dismissive of depth
types.growth_edge: Allowing your partner to protect you sometimes
types.famous_archetype: The lighthouse, always there, never dramatic about it

PLD.summary: The Depth-Seeking Pursuer finds everything they need in the Steadfast Protector

PLW.summary: The Pursuer-Lover finds stability and emotional safety here

ALD.summary: The Lone Wolf finally feels safe enough to let someone in

ALW.summary: The Protector is drawn to the mystery but may need more access eventually

PGD.summary: Two protectors can feel more like business partners than lovers

AGW.summary: Compatible on independence, but the depth-difference may create distance

PGW.summary: Both protect but neither goes fully deep, something always feels missing

AGD.summary: Two guardians who both wait for the other to open first, emotional stalemate

types.name: The Silent Devotee
types.description: You are deeply devoted in a quiet way that the world does not always recognize as love. You show up consistently, protect fiercely, and need your own space to stay whole. You believe love does not need to be declared loudly to be real.
challenges: Partner may feel unloved without words
types.love_language: Acts of service and comfortable shared silence
needs_in_partner: Someone who reads actions as love without needing constant verbal affirmation
A partner who is secure enough not to interpret quiet as coldness
Someone who values presence over performance
A person comfortable with space and independence within the relationship
red_flags: Partners who need frequent emotional processing conversations to feel connected
Someone who interprets silence as indifference or withdrawal
People who require verbal reassurance to trust the relationship
Partners who escalate when their bids for closeness are met with quiet
types.growth_edge: Articulating love in words, even when it feels unnecessary
types.famous_archetype: The quiet partner who has always been the answer

ALW.summary: Two independent wonder-keepers, peaceful and mutually respectful

ALD.summary: The Lone Wolf appreciates the non-suffocating devotion

PGW.summary: Compatible energy, both grounded, but emotional expression gap may grow

PLW.summary: The Wonder-Keeper Pursuer adds warmth the Silent Devotee needs

PLD.summary: The Depth-Seeker will feel emotionally starved in this pairing

PGD.summary: The protective depth-seeker may feel blocked at every emotional door

AGD.summary: Could work if one person learns to open more, requires active effort

AGW.summary: Two silent devotees can love in complete parallel without ever meeting

types.name: The Soul Searcher
types.tagline: Looking for someone to know completely
types.description: You love with a hunger for total intimacy. You want to know every layer, every wound, every dream. For you love without depth is just company. You give everything and you need everything in return. The right person will feel like finally being understood.
strengths: Transforms both people in the relationship
challenges: Needs too much too soon for some
types.love_language: Quality time and deep conversation without time limits
needs_in_partner: Someone who finds total vulnerability exciting rather than terrifying
A partner who matches emotional investment with emotional investment
Someone who actively shares their inner world, fears, and history
A person who sees deep intimacy as the point of love, not a side effect
red_flags: Partners who label deep emotional intimacy as neediness
Someone who deflects personal questions or keeps conversations surface-level
People who are emotionally unavailable but expect loyalty in return
Partners who pull away precisely when vulnerability is offered
types.growth_edge: Allowing love to develop at different speeds for different people
types.famous_archetype: The one who loves you so completely it changes you permanently

AGD.summary: The Steadfast Protector is everything the Soul Searcher has been looking for

PGD.summary: Two depth-seekers, intense and profound, must watch for codependency

PLW.summary: The Wonder-Keeper will frustrate the Soul Searcher but also fascinate them

PLD.summary: Mutual depth, risk of losing themselves in each other

ALD.summary: The Lone Wolf's distance will feel like rejection to the Soul Searcher

ALW.summary: The mystery will drive the Soul Searcher to anxious pursuit

AGW.summary: The silence will feel like emotional abandonment over time

PGW.summary: The protector grounds the Soul Searcher but may not go deep enough

types.name: The Enchanting Pursuer
types.description: You want closeness but you know how to keep things alive. You pursue warmly and openly but you do not need to completely consume your partner. You are the romantic who writes love letters but also respects a closed door. The perfect balance of intensity and lightness.
challenges: Can seem inconsistent in emotional depth
types.love_language: Words of affirmation and spontaneous romantic gestures
needs_in_partner: Someone who appreciates warmth and romantic gestures without requiring total vulnerability
A partner who can receive love openly without demanding excavation
Someone emotionally available but not emotionally consuming
A person who keeps their own sense of self alive within the relationship
red_flags: Partners who need crisis-level emotional processing on a regular basis
Someone who treats lightheartedness as emotional avoidance
People who push the relationship into heavy territory before it is ready
Partners who interpret warmth without full disclosure as a lack of trust
types.growth_edge: Going deeper when the relationship calls for it instead of keeping it light
types.famous_archetype: The partner who makes everyday life feel like a romance novel

AGW.summary: The Silent Devotee provides grounding while the Pursuer provides warmth

AGD.summary: The Protector's stability balances the Pursuer's romantic energy perfectly

ALW.summary: Two wonder-keepers with warmth, light and alive

PGW.summary: Both keep mystery but the Pursuer's warmth fills what the Guardian lacks

PLD.summary: The Soul Searcher may push for more than the Wonder-Keeper wants to give

PGD.summary: The protector's stability grounds the romantic pursuer well

ALD.summary: The Lone Wolf will occasionally feel just enough pulled toward the warm Pursuer

PLW.summary: Two romantic wonder-keepers, fun but may never go truly deep

types.name: The Devoted Guardian
types.tagline: I will protect you and I need to know everything
types.description: You love by wrapping people in safety and demanding full access to their world. You are not controlling, you are deeply invested. You need to feel essential to your partner and you need to feel known. When both those needs are met, you are the most loyal force on earth.
challenges: Pursuer energy can overwhelm avoidant types
types.love_language: Acts of service and long emotional conversations
needs_in_partner: Someone who genuinely wants to be fully known and fully cared for
A partner who welcomes protection as an act of love, not control
Someone who communicates openly and invites emotional closeness
A person who allows themselves to be supported without pushing away
red_flags: Partners who interpret caring behavior as controlling or suffocating
Someone who withholds themselves emotionally while accepting protection
People who see the need for depth as intrusive rather than loving
Partners who use independence to avoid emotional accountability
types.growth_edge: Trusting that love can exist without complete transparency
types.famous_archetype: The one who would walk through fire for you and just needs you to tell them how you are feeling

PLD.summary: Two depth-seekers who both want to be fully known, powerful and intense

ALD.summary: The Lone Wolf benefits from the protection but may feel the pursuit as pressure

PLW.summary: The Wonder-Keeper brings lightness the Devoted Guardian needs

ALW.summary: The mystery is magnetic but the Guardian may eventually feel locked out

AGD.summary: Two guardian depth-seekers, solid but may both wait to be pursued

PGW.summary: Both protect but the depth difference creates a permanent gap

AGW.summary: The silent devotee cannot give the depth the Devoted Guardian craves

PGD.summary: Two devoted guardians, incredible safety, risk of over-merging

types.name: The Tender Keeper
types.tagline: Close enough to hold you, wise enough to let you be
types.description: You are the rare type who can be warmly close without needing total access. You pursue with gentleness and protect without possessing. You love people for who they are, including the parts they keep private. You are the rarest kind of safe.
challenges: May avoid conflict by maintaining pleasant distance
Wonder-keeping can leave partner feeling unseen
Less likely to initiate deep emotional conversations
types.love_language: Physical touch and comfortable shared presence
needs_in_partner: Someone who wants warmth and protection without needing to be completely decoded
A partner who feels loved through presence and care, not just conversation
Someone who appreciates gentleness as a form of strength
A person who does not mistake emotional ease for emotional shallowness
red_flags: Partners who interpret gentleness as a lack of passion or drive
Someone who needs intensity or emotional urgency to feel loved
People who push aggressively for deep emotional disclosure before trust is built
Partners who confuse peacefulness with avoidance
types.growth_edge: Initiating depth, not just holding space for it
types.famous_archetype: The partner who somehow always knew exactly what you needed without asking

PLW.summary: The romantic pursuer brings passion, the tender keeper brings grounding

ALD.summary: The Lone Wolf feels safe enough to come close without feeling trapped

ALW.summary: Two wonder-keepers, comfortable but may never reach true intimacy

AGW.summary: Peaceful and respectful but may become more roommates than lovers

PLD.summary: The Soul Searcher needs more than the Tender Keeper naturally offers

PGD.summary: The Devoted Guardian needs depth the Tender Keeper tends to avoid

AGD.summary: The Steadfast Protector adds depth that completes the Tender Keeper

PGW.summary: Two tender keepers, warm and comfortable, but growth requires pushing boundaries
